ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vat_codes" (
  "vat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each VAT code */,
  "l10n_ar_afip_code" TEXT /* AFIP code for VAT as per local regulations */,
  "l10n_ar_natural_vat" REAL /* Natural VAT applicable to consumers */,
  "l10n_ar_legal_entity_vat" REAL /* Legal entity VAT applicable to businesses */,
  "l10n_ar_other_vat" REAL /* Other VAT types applicable under specific circumstances */,
  "vat_code_name" TEXT /* Name of the VAT code */,
  "vat_code_description" TEXT /* Description of the VAT code */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the VAT code is applicable */,
  "vat_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the VAT type (Natural VAT, Legal Entity VAT, etc.) */,
  "vat_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the VAT category (Standard Rate, Reduced Rate, etc.) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the VAT code becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the VAT code expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vat_codes_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vat_codes_vat_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("vat_type_id") REFERENCES vat_types ("vat_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vat_codes_vat_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("vat_category_id") REFERENCES vat_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legal_entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legal entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the legal entity */,
  "vat_registration_number" TEXT /* VAT registration number for the entity */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code where the entity is registered */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to the entity */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the entity */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the entity is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the entity */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legal_entities_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the legal entity involved in the transaction */,
  "vat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the VAT code applicable to the transaction */,
  "transaction_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the transaction before VAT */,
  "vat_amount" REAL /* Calculated VAT amount for the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code of the transaction */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate applied to the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES legal_entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_vat_id FOREIGN KEY ("vat_id") REFERENCES vat_codes ("vat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vat_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each VAT report */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the legal entity for which the report is generated */,
  "report_period" TEXT /* Time period for the report (e.g., Q1 2023) */,
  "total_transactions" REAL /* Total number of transactions reported */,
  "total_vat_collected" REAL /* Total VAT collected in the reporting period */,
  "report_generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "submission_status" TEXT /* Status of the report submission (e.g., submitted, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vat_reports_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES legal_entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "vat_registration_threshold" REAL /* Threshold for VAT registration in the country */,
  "vat_filing_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of VAT filing in the country (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., accountant, admin, auditor) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the legal entity affected by the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was performed */,
  "changed_data" TEXT /* Details of the changed data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES legal_entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vat_types" (
  "vat_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each VAT type */,
  "vat_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the VAT type (e.g., Natural VAT, Legal Entity VAT) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the VAT type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vat_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vat_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vat_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each VAT category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the VAT category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the VAT category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vat_reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the legal entity for which the reminder is set */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date of the reminder */,
  "reminder_type" TEXT /* Type of reminder (e.g., VAT filing, payment due) */,
  "reminder_description" TEXT /* Description of the reminder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vat_reminders_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES legal_entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vat_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the legal entity for which the notification is sent */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., VAT law change, system update) */,
  "notification_description" TEXT /* Description of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vat_notifications_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES legal_entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vat_filing_statuses" (
  "filing_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filing status */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the legal entity for which the filing status is tracked */,
  "filing_period" TEXT /* Period for which the VAT filing status is tracked (e.g., Q1 2023) */,
  "filing_status" TEXT /* Status of the VAT filing (e.g., submitted, pending, failed) */,
  "filing_date" TEXT /* Date of the VAT filing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filing_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vat_filing_statuses_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES legal_entities ("entity_id")
)
